name: 5dive-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins maintained by 5dive — Telegram bridge and related agent-channel integrations.

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Telegram messaging bridge for Claude Code with access control, multi-agent routing, and bundled lifecycle hooks. Fork of Anthropic's official telegram plugin extended with 5dive auto-relay, stop-reply checks, and ask-user-question routing.

plugins.name: dashboard
plugins.description: 5dive dashboard chat channel — talk to your agent from the authenticated web dashboard (and mobile app). Native-push inbound via the box agent-inbox drop-dir, outbound via the control-plane messages API.
